parameters.query: SELECT 'Ronin' AS calname, type,title,due_at,amount,source_hint,source_subject,source_msg_id FROM intake_items WHERE type IN ('event','due') AND student IN ('ronin','both') ORDER BY due_at;
SELECT 'Rory' AS calname, type,title,due_at,amount,source_hint,source_subject,source_msg_id FROM intake_items WHERE type IN ('event','due') AND student IN ('rory','both') ORDER BY due_at;
